prestazioni: Engine swap to a M117.964 (5.0L V8) from the 500SL with a custom billet crankshaft by Mahle Motorsport, forged pistons by JE (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 450+ hp with a naturally aspirated build. Pair with a custom Schrick 284° camshaft profile and a ported/polished cylinder head by EuroSpec Performance for optimized airflow.

Installation of a custom-fabricated stainless steel 4-into-1 exhaust manifold by Supersprint, paired with a 3.5-inch dual-exhaust system featuring MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers and ceramic-coated piping for reduced backpressure and aggressive tone. Include a custom ECU remap by Dyno Dynamics (Australia) to optimize fueling and ignition timing for the M117 engine.

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (R107-specific valving), paired with polyurethane bushings by Powerflex (PFB80-120 for front control arms) and a custom-fabricated 25mm front sway bar by Hotchkis. Add a limited-slip differential by OS Giken (Super Lock LSD) with a 3.92:1 final drive ratio for improved cornering and acceleration.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using R107-specific fiberglass fender flares by RWB Japan (modified for R107 chassis), paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem R107 kit). Paint in a custom two-tone scheme: Mercedes-Benz Classic Signal Red (DB 568) with matte black accents (Sikkens 9010).

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro SRD front seats (R107-specific mounting brackets), a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a full dashboard restoration using genuine Mercedes-Benz wood trim (Burl Walnut) with a modern touchscreen infotainment system (Dynavin D99+ with Apple CarPlay/Android Auto).

Custom forged 17x9 ET15 front and 17x10 ET20 rear wheels by BBS (LM-R style, gold finish) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear). Add a custom engine bay dress-up with a carbon fiber valve cover by Carbonio and a custom billet aluminum oil cap by Billet Specialties (engraved with the M117 engine code).
